analysis: That opening night — 5 hours 24 with two and a half hours awake — was rough, but look what happened after: five of your last six nights hit over seven and a half hours, and you closed the week with back-to-back near-nines on the 25th and 26th, the best of the lot. Your REM on the 26th hit exactly two hours, which is genuinely excellent, and the awake time dropped to just 37 minutes — that is your stack working. The one thing worth watching is that deep sleep has been a little inconsistent, peaking at over an hour on the 21st but sliding back down to 28 minutes by the end of the week, so that's the texture to keep an eye on. Overall though, the trend is unmistakably upward, and you built it yourself, night by night, with a shower and some lavender oil and the audacity to actually go to bed.
